Why APEX Motors
An Experience Beyond the Sale
🛡️
5-Year Warranty
Every vehicle comes with our comprehensive 5-year, unlimited-kilometre warranty backed by certified technicians.
🔧
150-Point Inspection
Our engineers perform an exhaustive mechanical and cosmetic inspection before any car enters our showroom floor.
💳
Zero-Cost EMI
Flexible financing with 0% interest on select models. Our finance team tailors the perfect plan for your budget.
🚗
Home Test Drive
We bring the car to your doorstep. Schedule a test drive at your home, office, or any location you prefer.
📋
RC & RTO Assistance
Complete documentation, registration, and insurance handled by our dedicated team — completely stress free.
🔄
Exchange & Upgrade
Trade in your current vehicle at the best market value and get instant credit toward your dream car.
